args: command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "docker is required for the filesystem MCP baseline" >&2; exit 1; }; exec docker run --rm -i --mount type=bind,src="$PWD",dst=/projects/workspace,ro mcp/filesystem /projects/workspace

command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "docker is required for the git MCP baseline" >&2; exit 1; }; exec docker run --rm -i --mount type=bind,src="$PWD",dst=/workspace,ro mcp/git --repository /workspace

command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "docker is required for the github MCP baseline" >&2; exit 1; }; test -n "$GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN" || { echo "set GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN to a fine-grained read-only GitHub PAT before enabling the github MCP baseline" >&2; exit 1; }; exec docker run --rm -i -e GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN ghcr.io/github/github-mcp-server
